payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The requested query was not executed, and no memory cards were read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative/debug SQL command, not a durable user memory statement.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because SQL debug mode is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate administrative environment before running debug SQL.
Use supported non-SQL Brain admin/debug commands if available.

raw_text: {"intent":"admin_sql_debug_request","decision":"rejected","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The input is an administrative/debug SQL command, not a durable user memory statement."},"conflict_classification":"not_applicable","answer":"SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The requested query was not executed, and no memory cards were read or modified.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate administrative environment before running debug SQL.","Use supported non-SQL Brain admin/debug commands if available."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Rejected /brain admin sql request because SQL debug mode is disabled.","No durable memory was committed.","No SQL results were returned."]}}
